headline: A Universal Index for Global IPTV Streams
lede: This community-driven collection standardizes thousands of live broadcast links into a single, accessible format. By maintaining organized M3U playlists and EPG data, the project democratizes access to international television.

headline: Standardizing Production-Grade Workflows for AI Coding Agents
lede: Transform unreliable AI assistants into rigorous engineering partners with this modular skill framework. Each slash command enforces disciplined software development habits to minimize technical debt and ensure consistent project outcomes.

headline: Chatwoot Offers a Scalable Open-Source Help Desk Alternative
lede: Centralize your customer interactions with a robust, self-hosted platform designed to replace costly SaaS solutions. This infrastructure provides total data control and seamless integration with existing technical workflows.

headline: Superpowers Framework Codifies Autonomous AI Development Cycles
lede: Professional software engineers leverage this plugin-based system to force AI assistants into disciplined, test-driven development. It ensures every code generation step undergoes systematic review and context-aware planning.

headline: Apple Container Executes Linux Workloads Natively on Silicon
lede: This specialized tool bridges the gap between OCI container standards and high-performance Apple virtualization. It provides developers a lightweight, low-level interface to run containerized Linux environments without compromising macOS speed.

headline: Music Assistant Unifies Fragmented Multi-Room Streaming Ecosystems
lede: Centralize your fragmented audio services into a single, automated server designed for persistent home environments. This tool ensures that your smart home's media remains under your absolute local control.

headline: Agentsview Tracks Costs Across Multiple AI Coding Sessions
lede: Monitor and analyze your AI expenditure with a local-first platform that aggregates session data into a performant SQLite database. Gain granular insights into usage patterns while ensuring sensitive operational data never leaves your infrastructure.

headline: LMCache Accelerates Large Model Performance Through Shared Memory
lede: Minimize redundant computations by treating the Key-Value cache as a reusable, distributed resource. This optimization layer significantly reduces latency for complex RAG pipelines and long-context LLM applications.

headline: PowerToys Extends Windows Shell Productivity for Advanced Users
lede: Enhance your daily workflow with a modular suite of system utilities designed for total OS customization. This collaborative collection offers the granular control power users expect in a modern technical environment.

headline: Aisuite Simplifies Provider-Agnostic AI Application Development
lede: Standardize your LLM integrations with a library that lets you switch providers by changing a single string. The included agent orchestration API invites developers to prototype complex tool-calling workflows without vendor lock-in.
